---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature or enhancement.

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you envision the feature working. Include example Terraform configuration if applicable:

```hcl
module "key" {
  source  = "registry.infrahouse.com/infrahouse/key/aws"
  version = "..."
  # new feature usage
}
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.
